Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackflame family]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Blackflame family held their empire for over five centuries through unstoppable force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame family united the empire and ruled it until the Naru took over fifty years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Children of the Blackflame family were deadly threats even at Copper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame family lost the Empire and almost died out because their madra eats away at their bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame family is an imperial family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame family has three ancient Trials.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame family was extremely wealthy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Blackflame family has fallen.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Blackflame family was once in charge of the Empire.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — There are no true members of the Blackflame family remaining.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Blackflame family is a reference used by Eithan regarding the naming of Windfall.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
